about.title: About
about.shortBio: Professional dietitian Leyla Zülfüqarlı has developed personalized nutrition plans for over 200 clients across 8+ years.
about.bio1: Leyla Zülfüqarlı is a professional dietitian with over 8 years of experience, having developed personalized, science-based nutrition plans for more than 200 clients. She applies a holistic approach, considering lifestyle, psychological state and health goals.
about.bio2: Leyla is also the author of a book on healthy nutrition, shares educational content on YouTube and social media, and presents expert nutritional advice at seminars and in media.
about.missionText1: Knowing that every person is unique, creating an individual nutrition plan for each one. Healthy living should be a pleasure, not a restriction.
about.missionText2: My goal is to improve not just my clients' weight, but their energy levels and quality of life.
about.socialDesc: Educational content on nutrition and healthy living on YouTube and social media

items.name: Aynur M.
items.text: With Dr. Leyla's plan, I lost 8 kg in 2 months. I never felt hungry and my energy levels skyrocketed!

items.name: Sevinc H.
items.text: I didn't believe in the no-exercise weight loss method at first, but I lost 5 kg in 6 weeks. So grateful!

items.name: Rena A.
items.text: I was very anxious during pregnancy. Dr. Leyla prepared a special plan for me, and I felt great throughout.

items.name: Konul S.
items.text: After the anti-aging nutrition plan, I feel 10 years younger. My skin has also improved significantly.

items.name: Lala T.
items.text: I lost 12 kg in 3 months. The plan was completely personalized, even my family noticed the difference!

items.a: Consultations take place both online (video call) and in person. In the first session, your health status, goals and lifestyle are analyzed.

items.q: How soon will I see results?
items.a: Results begin to appear within the first 2 weeks. On average, a healthy weight loss of 3-5 kg per month is achievable. Results vary by individual goals.
Yes, every plan is completely customized based on your age, weight, health status, food preferences and lifestyle.

items.q: Is it possible to lose weight without exercise?
items.a: Yes. Leyla's methodology is built around exercise-free weight loss. With the right nutrition plan, effective results are possible without workouts.

items.q: Where can I buy the book?
items.a: "The Secret of Weight — The Key to Slimness" is available to order via WhatsApp, and also on BakuBookCenter and Alinino.az.
